mapper.select: SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(HD.APP_END_DATE HD.APP_END_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS APPLY_POSSIBLE_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN AP.APP_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS APP_INFO ,(CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'NC' -- 지명경쟁 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(P.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDAP P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND P.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' -- 지명경쟁인 경우 지명된 협력사만 보이도록 함 ELSE '0' END) ELSE (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(P.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCVNCM P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND P.CONFIRM_FLAG = 'E' AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' -- 지명경쟁이 아닌 경우 거래희망고객사에 승인된 협력사만 보이도록 함 ELSE '0' END) END) AS AP_INCLUDE_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE A.AP_INCLUDE_FLAG = '1'

SELECT A.CONT_TYPE1, A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_NM , A.COMPANY_REG_NO, A.ADDR, A.TEL_NO, A.CEO_USER_NM, A.IRS_NO , A.ANN_NO, A.ANN_DATE, A.ANN_ITEM , A.BID_GUAR_RATE, A.CUR, A.BID_GUAR_AMT, A.VAT_TYPE , A.BID_GUAR_TYPE, A.GUARANTEER, A.GUAR_REQ_NUM, A.GUAR_NUM, A.INSU_STATUS , A.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM, A.GUAR_ATT_FILE_CNT, A.APP_DATE , A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT , A.APPLY_POSSIBLE_FLAG , A.TODAY_YEAR, A.TODAY_MONTH, A.TODAY_DAY , A.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM, A.APP_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.APP_END_DATE, A.APP_END_TIME, A.APP_END_MIN , A.APP_DATETIME, A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM, A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM, A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , HD.CONT_TYPE1 ,(AP.VENDOR_CD, #{VENDOR_CD}) AS VENDOR_CD , GL.VENDOR_NM , GL.COMPANY_REG_NO ,GL.HQ_ADDR_1 ' ' GL.HQ_ADDR_2 AS ADDR ,GL.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO ,GL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , GL.IRS_NO , HD.ANN_NO , SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 0, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 7, 2) AS ANN_DATE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AS TODAY_YEAR, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MM') AS TODAY_MONTH, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD') AS TODAY_DAY , HD.ANN_ITEM , 5 AS BID_GUAR_RATE ,(AP.BID_GUAR_AMT, 0) AS BID_GUAR_AMT ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M023', HD.CUR, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CUR ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M100', HD.VAT_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VAT_TYPE , AP.BID_GUAR_TYPE , AP.GUARANTEER , AP.GUAR_REQ_NUM ,(SUBSTR(AP.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') AS GUAR_NUM , AP.INSU_STATUS , AP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,GETFILECOUNT(AP.GATE_CD, AP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM) AS GUAR_ATT_FILE_CNT , AP.APP_DATE ,(CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'NC' -- 지명경쟁 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(P.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDAP P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND P.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' -- 지명경쟁인 경우 지명된 협력사만 보이도록 함 ELSE '0' END) ELSE (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(P.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCVNCM P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND P.CONFIRM_FLAG = 'E' AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' -- 지명경쟁이 아닌 경우 거래희망고객사에 승인된 협력사만 보이도록 함 ELSE '0' END) END) AS AP_INCLUDE_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(HD.APP_END_DATE HD.APP_END_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS APPLY_POSSIBLE_FLAG , AP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM ,GETFILECOUNT(AP.GATE_CD, AP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM) AS APP_ATT_FILE_CNT , HD.APP_END_DATE , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) AS APP_END_TIME , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 4) AS APP_END_MIN , TO_DATE(AP.APP_DATE||AP.APP_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APP_DATETIME ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL GL ON (GL.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND GL.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BID_STATUS != '9999' ) A WHERE A.AP_INCLUDE_FLAG = '1'

SELECT (CASE WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(HD.APP_END_DATE HD.APP_END_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS APPLY_POSSIBLE_FLAG , AP.APP_DATE FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCBDAP SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , BID_GUAR_AMT = NULL -- 보증금 , GUAR_AMT_CERTV = NULL -- 보증금액 전자서명값 , GUAR_AMT_DET_CERTV = NULL -- 보증금액 전자서명값(보증내역) , GUAR_AMT_CERTNUM = NULL -- 인증서번호(전자서명) , BID_GUAR_TYPE = NULL -- 보증금납부방법[M309] , GUARANTEER = NULL -- 보증기관[M402] , GUAR_REQ_NUM = NULL -- 보증신청번호 , GUAR_NUM = NULL -- 보증증권번호 , GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM = NULL -- 보증첨부파일번호 , GUAR_RESULT = NULL -- 보증신청결과메세지 , APP_DATE = NULL -- 입찰신청일자 , APP_TIME = NULL -- 입찰신청시간 , APP_ATT_FILE_NUM = NULL -- 입찰신청첨부파일 , VID_RANDOM = NULL -- 서명값 생성/검증을 위한 Random Key , VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM = NULL -- 협력업체 담당자명 , VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM = NULL -- 협력업체 담당자 전화번호 , VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL = NULL -- 협력업체 담당자 이메일 WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}
mapper.select: SELECT HD.ANN_NO ,HD.ANN_ITEM ,HD.ANNO_OPEN_FLAG ,CASE WHEN HD.ANNO_FLAG = '1' THEN '여' ELSE '부' END ANNO_FLAG ,SUBSTR(ANNO_DATE,1,4) '년 ' SUBSTR(ANNO_DATE,5,2) '월 ' SUBSTR(ANNO_DATE,7,2) '일 ' SUBSTR(ANNO_TIME_FROM,1,2) '시 ' SUBSTR(ANNO_TIME_FROM,3,2) '분 ~ ' SUBSTR(ANNO_TIME_TO,1,2) '시 ' SUBSTR(ANNO_TIME_TO,3,2) '분' AS ANNO_DATE ,HD.ANNO_PLACE , HD.ANNO_NOTIFIER ' / ' HD.ANNO_RESP AS ANNO_NOTIFIER ,HD.ANNO_RMK ,HD.PROP_OPEN_FLAG ,CASE WHEN HD.PROP_FLAG = '1' THEN '여' ELSE '부' END PROP_FLAG ,SUBSTR(PROP_DATE,1,4) '년 ' SUBSTR(PROP_DATE,5,2) '월 ' SUBSTR(PROP_DATE,7,2) '일 ' SUBSTR(PROP_TIME_FROM,1,2) '시 ' SUBSTR(PROP_TIME_FROM,3,2) '분 ~ ' SUBSTR(PROP_TIME_TO,1,2) '시 ' SUBSTR(PROP_TIME_TO,3,2) '분' AS PROP_DATE ,HD.PROP_PLACE , HD.PROP_NOTIFIER ' / ' HD.PROP_RESP AS PROP_NOTIFIER ,HD.PROP_RMK FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , AP.VENDOR_CD , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_ITEM , HD.CONT_TYPE1 , HD.CONT_TYPE2 , HD.CONT_TYPE3 , PG.VOTE_CNT , SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_BEGIN_DATETIME , SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_END_DATETIME ,getSupBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, PG.VOTE_CNT, AP.VENDOR_CD, 'CD') AS BID_STATUS ,getSupBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, PG.VOTE_CNT, AP.VENDOR_CD, 'LOC') AS BID_STATUS_LOC , HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(VO.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDVO VO WHERE VO.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND VO.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND VO.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND VO.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = PG.VOTE_CNT AND VO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS SEND_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(VO.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDVO VO WHERE VO.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND VO.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND VO.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND VO.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = PG.VOTE_CNT AND VO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE (CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE2 = 'TD' THEN (CASE WHEN AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG = '600' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) ELSE 'Y' END) END) AS SEND_POSSIBLE_FLAG ,(SELECT MAX(V.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDVO V WHERE V.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND V.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND V.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND V.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND V.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND V.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT ,(SELECT V.VOTE_CNT FROM (SELECT VOTE_CNT, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY PG.GATE_CD, PG.BUYER_CD, PG.BID_NUM, PG.BID_CNT ORDER BY PG.MOD_DATE DESC) AS RANK FROM STOCBDPG PG WHERE PG.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND PG.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND PG.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND PG.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') V WHERE V.RANK = 1) AS PRECENT_VOTE FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD= #{ses.companyCd} AND ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') != '600' AND (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') != '600') AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT
AND ((PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME >= #{BID_BEGIN_DATE} '000000' AND PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME <= #{BID_END_DATE} '235959') OR (PG.BID_END_DATE PG.BID_END_TIME >= #{BID_BEGIN_DATE} '000000' AND PG.BID_END_DATE PG.BID_END_TIME <= #{BID_END_DATE} '235959') )
AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '2500', '9999') AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND getSupBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, PG.VOTE_CNT, AP.VENDOR_CD, 'CD') = #{BID_STATUS}
AND UPPER(HD.ANN_NO) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ANN_NO}) '%'
AND UPPER(HD.ANN_ITEM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ANN_ITEM}) '%'
) A
WHERE (CASE WHEN (TO_NUMBER(A.ORI_BID_STATUS) < 2400 OR A.ORI_BID_STATUS = '2550') THEN '1' WHEN (A.ORI_BID_STATUS = '2410' AND (SELECT MAX((SV.BID_STATUS, '100')) FROM STOCBDVO SV WHERE SV.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND SV.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND SV.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND SV.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND SV.VENDOR_CD = A.VENDOR_CD AND SV.DEL_FLAG = '0') = '200' AND A.VOTE_CNT <= PRECENT_VOTE) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) = '1' ORDER BY A.BID_END_DATETIME DESC, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT

SELECT HD.ANN_NO ,HD.ANN_ITEM ,getContTypeTxt(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE_TXT ,HD.BID_USER_ID, GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM ,HD.CUR, (VO.BID_AMT, 0) AS BID_AMT ,GETCODENAME(HD.GATE_CD, 'M100', HD.VAT_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS VAT_TYPE_LOC ,HD.VAT_TYPE ,HD.BID_CNT ,VO.ATT_FILE_NUM AS VO_ATT_FILE_NUM ,HD.ESTM_TYPE, VO.CHOICE_ESTM_NUM1, VO.CHOICE_ESTM_NUM2 ,HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_STATUS ,HD.CONT_TYPE1, HD.CONT_TYPE2, HD.CONT_TYPE3, (HD.TCO_FLAG, '0') AS TCO_FLAG ,AP.VENDOR_CD, PG.VOTE_CNT ,VNGL.IRS_NO ,(CASE WHEN VO.VENDOR_CD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS SEND_FLAG ,HD.TCO_YEAR_CNT, VO.TCO_AMT ,VO.ADJ_PRC_STATUS FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT} AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (HD.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = VO.VOTE_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT DT.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM , DT.PURCHASE_TYPE , DT.ITEM_CD , DT.ITEM_DESC , DT.ITEM_SPEC , DT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.PR_BUYER_CD, 'MK', DT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , DT.MAKER_ART_NO , DT.ORIGIN_CD , DT.PR_QT AS BID_QT -- 입찰수량 ,(CASE WHEN (BDVD.PR_QT, '0') = '0' THEN DT.PR_QT ELSE BDVD.PR_QT END) AS PR_QT -- 협력사 투찰수량(존재하는 경우 투찰수량을 사용함) , DT.UNIT_CD , BDVD.UNIT_PRC , BDVD.PR_AMT , DT.TCO_YEAR_CNT , BDVD.TCO_AMT , BDVD.SW_BUS_AMT , BDVD.MNT_SANGJU_YN , BDVD.CONSUMER_AMT , BDVD.FC_MNT_TERM , BDVD.CH_RATE , BDVD.DOIB_AMOUNT , BDVD.MNT_RATE ,(BDVD.MNT_SDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_SDAY ,(BDVD.MNT_EDAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS MNT_EDAY , BDVD.MNT_GUR_MONTH , BDVD.RT_INSP_PERIOD , BDVD.FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,(DT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , DT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS PR_ATT_FILE_NUM , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(DT.GATE_CD, DT.ATT_FILE_NUM)) AS PR_ATT_FILE_CNT , BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM , TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(BDVD.GATE_CD, BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM)) AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_CNT , TO_CHAR(DT.ITEM_RMK) AS PR_ITEM_RMK , BDVD.ITEM_RMK AS VENDOR_ITEM_RMK , DT.BUYER_CD , DT.BID_NUM , DT.BID_CNT , BDVD.VOTE_CNT , BDVD.VENDOR_CD , DT.ITEM_SQ , DT.PR_NUM , DT.PR_SQ , DT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCBDDT DT LEFT JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (BDVD.GATE_CD = DT.GATE_CD AND BDVD.BUYER_CD = DT.BUYER_CD AND BDVD.BID_NUM = DT.BID_NUM AND BDVD.BID_CNT = DT.BID_CNT AND BDVD.ITEM_SQ = DT.ITEM_SQ AND BDVD.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT} AND BDVD.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE DT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND DT.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND DT.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY BDVD.ITEM_SQ

SELECT getBuyerNames(BDAP.GATE_CD, BDAP.BUYER_CD, 'BID', BDAP.BID_NUM, BDAP.BID_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , BDAP.GUAR_NUM , (SELECT ANN_NO FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = BDAP.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = BDAP.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ANN_NO , (SELECT BID_USER_ID FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = BDAP.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = BDAP.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS BID_USER_ID , (SELECT GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = BDAP.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = BDAP.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS BID_USER_NM , BDAP.VENDOR_CD , GETVENDORNAME(BDAP.GATE_CD, BDAP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SYS_DATE FROM STOCBDAP BDAP WHERE BDAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDAP.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) AND BDAP.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BDAP.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND BDAP.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND BDAP.BID_GUAR_TYPE = 'E' AND BDAP.GUAR_NUM IS NOT NULL AND BDAP.DEL_FLAG = '0'
